• Three‑js scene with a rotating groan‑tube model.
  • Web Audio API synth generates a vowel‑shaped “eeee‑oooo‑ettt” sound.
  • Press R or click the tube to flip it with animated puck movement.
    audioCtx = new AudioContext();
    tubeGroup.rotation.y += 0.005;

This page creates a simple 3‑D tube that spins automatically and can be flipped by keyboard or mouse interactions. The flip triggers a synthesized groan sound built from oscillators, filters, and a short click envelope. The UI includes a start button, overlay title, and controls hint for easy use.
